---
description: "Use when editing the brain configuration files. Ensures AGENTS.md and projects.md stay well-structured."
applyTo: "brain/**"
---

# Brain File Conventions

- `brain/AGENTS.md` is the routing config — keep routing rules, ADO config, and preferences here
- `brain/projects.md` is the project registry — one section per active project
- Never remove routing rules without user confirmation
- Keep ADO configuration (org, project, area path) at the top for easy updates
- Update conventions section after running the ADO workflow interview
